hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -q 'pom\.xml$' && { echo 'pom.xml edits require human review — please confirm with the user before changing Maven config.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '\.java$' && mvn -q compile 2>&1 | tail -20 || exit 0
